## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Ambient.ai and GrowthX Labs to discuss content strategy, progress, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production pace is behind but adjustments are being made to improve workflow and address concerns](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [New content opportunities discussed: glossary pages, integration-focused articles, and building-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Need for clearer progress tracking on content clusters/campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [Importance of aligning terminology with Ambient's messaging document and carefully considering SEO-driven terms](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Progress and Adjustments

  - [Double the engaged sessions compared to previous week, gaining traction](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Transitioning to an agentic workflow to address concerns about repetitive information and improve content quality](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Currently focusing on more bottom-of-funnel educational content while workflow adjustments are implemented](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [Three articles ready for publishing, with five more to be generated by end of next day](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)

### New Content Opportunities

  - [Glossary pages performing well, opportunity to expand (currently only 4 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Potential for integration-focused content series (e.g., AI layer on Sony cameras, LANL access control)](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [Suggestion to approach verticals through building types rather than industry verticals](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Consideration of SEO-driven content model based on competitive analysis](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)

### Content Tracking and Reporting

  - [Team to develop visualization for progress tracking, likely organized by content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [Need to clarify completion status of current content campaigns (e.g., gun detection for schools)](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [Importance of defining sprints, asset counts, and measurement metrics for each strategy](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)

### Terminology and Messaging Alignment

  - [Team should familiarize themselves with Ambient's messaging document for consistent terminology](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - [Caution advised when using AI-related terms (e.g., contextual AI, agentic AI) that may not accurately reflect Ambient's technology](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - ["Physical Access Control System" (PACS) confirmed as correct term for access control systems](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [Some SEO-relevant terms (e.g., spatial intelligence) may not be applicable to Ambient's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement new agentic workflow to improve content quality and address concerns](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Develop and share progress visualization for content clusters/campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [Review Ambient's messaging document to ensure terminology alignment](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - [Publish three articles and generate five more by end of next day](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
  - [Maintain clear list of content ready for publishing in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
  - [Follow up on specific content questions and approvals via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/LjkQiz5Tea-btBHrmZatfqVvCcyCpexg?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
